projectDescription: A zero-trust credential broker that lets AI agents make authenticated API calls without ever seeing your secrets — credentials are injected server-side, every request is approved by you, and access can be revoked instantly.
keyFeatures: Zero-trust credential brokering — secrets never enter agent prompts, logs, or memory
Ed25519 cryptographic device identity with challenge-response authentication
Per-hostname policies with just-in-time human approval (app or Telegram)
Instant revocation — deactivate an agent or single approval in one click
Immutable audit logs for every proxied request
70+ pre-built provider integrations (Anthropic, Stripe, GitHub, Slack, and more)
MCP server support alongside API key management
Enterprise self-hosted deployment inside your own VPC with AWS Secrets Manager
Auto-expiring ephemeral credentials via time-limited authorization
Official agent skills for Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, and 40+ other agents
